articles.title: Charles Barkley impressed by Jayson Tatum in return, but doesn’t view Celtics as favorites in East
articles.description:
"I'm not changing my pick from the Cavaliers."

The post Charles Barkley impressed by Jayson Tatum in return, but doesn’t view Celtics as favorites in East appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum returned to the Celtics, impressing Charles Barkley with his performance.
Barkley maintains the Cavaliers as his Eastern Conference favorites despite Tatum's return.
Celtics fans may feel concerned about their team's championship prospects this season.

articles.title: Mass. man accused of impersonating an Army veteran for more than 30 years
articles.description:
Federal prosecutors say the Pittsfield man has posed as an Army veteran since the 1990s to receive VA care and other government benefits.

The post Mass. man accused of impersonating an Army veteran for more than 30 years appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pittsfield man accused of impersonating Army veteran since the 1990s.
Federal prosecutors allege he received VA care and government benefits unlawfully.
Local veterans' organizations express concern over trust and integrity in benefit systems.

articles.title: Watch: Body cam video shows officer rescuing man, 78, from burning truck
articles.description:
An officer and two Good Samaritans rushed into danger to free a driver trapped inside a burning pickup.

The post Watch: Body cam video shows officer rescuing man, 78, from burning truck appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Officer and two Good Samaritans rescued a 78-year-old man from a burning truck.
Incident occurred on March 7, showcasing quick action by local responders.
The rescue highlights community bravery and the importance of emergency preparedness in Boston.

articles.title: US attorney going after money forfeited by Mass. resident in romance crypto fraud scheme
articles.description:
A civil complaint alleges funds worth $327,000 were laundered through crypto wallets after a dating-app investment scheme.

The post US attorney going after money forfeited by Mass. resident in romance crypto fraud scheme appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US attorney files civil complaint against Massachusetts resident for $327,000 in crypto fraud.
Funds were allegedly laundered through crypto wallets linked to a dating-app investment scheme.
Boston residents may see increased scrutiny on crypto investments following this case.

articles.title: US immigration authorities arrest Spanish-language news reporter in Tennessee
articles.description:
Rodriguez, a Colombian citizen, entered the U.S lawfully and has been living in the country for the past five years, court records filed by her lawyer show.

The post US immigration authorities arrest Spanish-language news reporter in Tennessee appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US immigration authorities arrested Colombian reporter Rodriguez in Tennessee on March 7, 2026.
Rodriguez has lived in the U.S. lawfully for five years, according to court records.
Her arrest raises concerns about the treatment of immigrant journalists in the Boston area.
